name: second-brain
description: Personal memory for Claude Code: a SessionEnd hook captures every session to raw/, then skills file the queue into a topical wiki and a temporal journal via three subagents (librarian, journal-extractor, journal-grouper). Plain Markdown notes — view in any editor (Obsidian optional).

vault_path.title: Second-brain vault path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your second-brain vault. Leave empty to disable session capture until you run /second-brain:init-vault.
